source: Safari and Bush Retreats curated Kenya, Uganda & Rwanda itineraries

packages.name: 9 Days Kenya Cultural Tour
packages.overview: A classic northern Kenya circuit combining Samburu's Special Five, flamingo-fringed Lake Nakuru, hippo boat rides on Lake Naivasha and the legendary Masai Mara - with authentic Maasai and Samburu cultural encounters.
highlights: Samburu Special Five on the Ewaso Ng'iro
Masai Mara Big Five game drives

itinerary.title: Nairobi to Samburu
itinerary.summary: Drive north to Samburu - afternoon game drive along the Ewaso Ng'iro River.

itinerary.title: Full day Samburu
itinerary.summary: Search for Grevy's zebra, reticulated giraffe and leopard in northern wilderness.

itinerary.title: Samburu to Lake Nakuru
itinerary.summary: Descend the Rift Valley to Lake Nakuru for rhino and flamingo viewing.

itinerary.title: Nakuru to Lake Naivasha
itinerary.summary: Morning game drive - transfer to Naivasha for afternoon boat safari among hippos.

itinerary.title: Naivasha to Masai Mara
itinerary.summary: Scenic drive to the Mara - sunset game drive on the savanna.

itinerary.title: Full day Masai Mara
itinerary.summary: Full-day game drives - lion, cheetah, elephant and the Mara River ecosystem.

itinerary.title: Mara exploration
itinerary.summary: Optional balloon safari at dawn - continue predator and plains game viewing.

itinerary.title: Mara cultural visit
itinerary.summary: Morning game drive - Maasai village visit and farewell bush dinner.

itinerary.title: Return to Nairobi
itinerary.summary: Sunrise drive - return to Nairobi for departure.

packages.name: 5 Days Masai Mara Safari
packages.overview: Five days in the Masai Mara - Kenya's most celebrated reserve - with extended game drives across rolling grasslands, the Mara River and acacia woodland for lion, cheetah, elephant and seasonal migration herds.

itinerary.title: Nairobi to Masai Mara
itinerary.summary: Drive or fly to the Mara - afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Full day Mara
itinerary.summary: Explore the central plains and predator territories.

itinerary.title: Mara River sector
itinerary.summary: Game drive toward the Mara River - hippo and crocodile viewing.

itinerary.title: Deep Mara exploration
itinerary.summary: Full-day drive to remote corners - cheetah and lion tracking.

itinerary.title: Morning drive & return
itinerary.summary: Sunrise game drive - return to Nairobi.

packages.name: 3 Days Amboseli Lodge Safari
packages.overview: A compact Amboseli safari beneath the snow-capped peak of Kilimanjaro - elephant herds, Observation Hill panoramas and swamp-fringed game drives in southern Kenya.

itinerary.title: Nairobi to Amboseli
itinerary.summary: Drive to Amboseli - afternoon game drive with Kilimanjaro views.

itinerary.title: Full day Amboseli
itinerary.summary: Morning and afternoon drives - elephants, lion and Observation Hill.

itinerary.title: Return to Nairobi
itinerary.summary: Sunrise game drive - return to Nairobi.

packages.name: 5 Days Uganda Gorilla & Wildlife Safari
packages.overview: Track mountain gorillas in Bwindi Impenetrable Forest then descend to Queen Elizabeth National Park for tree-climbing lions, Kazinga Channel boat cruises and classic Ugandan savannah wildlife.

itinerary.title: Entebbe to Bwindi
itinerary.summary: Fly or drive to Bwindi - briefing and lodge check-in.

itinerary.title: Gorilla trekking
itinerary.summary: Guided trek to habituated mountain gorilla family in Bwindi.

itinerary.title: Bwindi to Queen Elizabeth
itinerary.summary: Transfer to Queen Elizabeth - afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Kazinga Channel & Ishasha
itinerary.summary: Morning boat cruise - afternoon Ishasha lion search.

itinerary.title: Return to Entebbe
itinerary.summary: Morning game drive - return to Entebbe.

packages.name: 7 Days Uganda Primates Safari
packages.overview: Uganda's ultimate primate circuit - mountain gorillas in Bwindi, wild chimpanzees in Kibale Forest and Nile thunder at Murchison Falls with game drives and boat cruise on the Victoria Nile.
highlights: Big game on the Nile delta

itinerary.title: Entebbe to Murchison
itinerary.summary: Drive north via Ziwa Rhino Sanctuary - afternoon Nile game drive.

itinerary.title: Murchison Falls
itinerary.summary: Morning game drive - boat to the base of the Falls.

itinerary.title: Murchison to Kibale
itinerary.summary: Drive south through the Rift Valley to Kibale Forest.

itinerary.title: Chimpanzee tracking
itinerary.summary: Morning chimp trek - afternoon Bigodi Wetland bird walk.

itinerary.title: Kibale to Bwindi
itinerary.summary: Scenic drive through the Albertine Rift to Bwindi.

itinerary.title: Gorilla trekking
itinerary.summary: Full-day mountain gorilla trek in Bwindi Impenetrable Forest.

itinerary.title: Return to Entebbe
itinerary.summary: Drive or fly back to Entebbe for departure.

packages.name: 4 Days Murchison Falls Safari
packages.overview: Four days at Uganda's largest park - game drives on the Buligi circuit, boat cruise to the base of Murchison Falls and top-of-the-falls viewpoint where the Nile explodes through a narrow gorge.

itinerary.title: Kampala to Murchison
itinerary.summary: Drive north - afternoon game drive on the northern bank.

itinerary.title: Falls boat cruise
itinerary.summary: Morning game drive - afternoon boat to the base of the Falls.

itinerary.title: Delta & top of Falls
itinerary.summary: Delta game drive - visit top of the Falls viewpoint.

itinerary.title: Return to Kampala
itinerary.summary: Sunrise drive - return to Kampala or Entebbe.

packages.name: 3 Days Rwanda Gorilla Trek
packages.overview: The essential Rwanda experience - one hour with a habituated mountain gorilla family in Volcanoes National Park, based in Musanze with dramatic Virunga volcano views.

itinerary.title: Kigali to Volcanoes
itinerary.summary: City tour option - drive to Musanze for trek briefing.

itinerary.title: Gorilla trekking
itinerary.summary: Guided trek to mountain gorillas in Volcanoes National Park.

itinerary.title: Return to Kigali
itinerary.summary: Optional golden monkey trek - return to Kigali.

packages.name: 5 Days Rwanda Gorillas & Lake Kivu
packages.overview: Combine a life-changing gorilla trek in the Virungas with lakeside relaxation on Lake Kivu - kayaking, island boat trips and sunset dining in Rubavu after your forest adventure.

itinerary.title: Arrive Kigali
itinerary.summary: Airport pickup - Kigali city tour and overnight.

itinerary.title: Kigali to Volcanoes
itinerary.summary: Drive to Musanze - gorilla trek briefing.

itinerary.title: Gorilla trekking
itinerary.summary: Mountain gorilla trek - afternoon transfer to Lake Kivu.

itinerary.title: Lake Kivu
itinerary.summary: Kayaking, boat trip or beach relaxation in Rubavu.

itinerary.title: Return to Kigali
itinerary.summary: Leisurely morning - return to Kigali for departure.

packages.name: 6 Days Rwanda Wildlife & Forest Safari
packages.overview: Beyond gorillas - Big Five game drives in restored Akagera National Park and chimpanzee tracking with canopy walkway adventures in ancient Nyungwe Forest.

itinerary.title: Kigali to Akagera
itinerary.summary: Drive east to Akagera - afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Full day Akagera
itinerary.summary: Morning and afternoon drives - lion, elephant and Lake Ihema boat trip.

itinerary.title: Akagera to Nyungwe
itinerary.summary: Cross Rwanda to the southern rainforest.

itinerary.title: Chimpanzee tracking
itinerary.summary: Morning chimp trek in Nyungwe Forest.

itinerary.title: Canopy walkway
itinerary.summary: Canopy walk and waterfall trail - colobus monkey viewing.

itinerary.title: Return to Kigali
itinerary.summary: Scenic drive north - Kigali departure.
